sw.name: Games
sw.title: Michezo ya Aviator na Crash
sw.description: Michezo kama Aviator, JetX na crash games nyingine — mapitio na mahali pa kucheza.

ln.name: Games
ln.title: Ba lisano ya Aviator mpe crash
ln.description: Ba lisano lokola Aviator, JetX mpe ba crash game mosusu — ba tala mpe esika ya kobeta.
